name: Nerys
archetype: Fiery Welsh warrior Reaver, defender of the highlands
speech_patterns: Speaks with intensity and strong emotion
Uses battle metaphors and warrior idioms
Voice rises when excited or angry
quirks: Challenges others to sparring matches when bored
Sings war ballads before major fights
Never backs down from a direct confrontation
example_phrases: Come on then! I'll show you how we fight in the highlands!
Iron sharpens iron, and battle tempers the soul!
You call that an attack? My grandmother hits harder, and she's been dead ten years!
By the old dragon's flame, we will prevail!
No retreat, no surrender! We stand our ground or we fall where we fought!
